message:
feat(lab): add saturation metrics and unexplored seed tracking

Exploration coverage improvements:
- Add SaturationMetrics struct tracking:
  - Window size for saturation detection heuristic
  - Saturated flag when no new classes discovered in window
  - Existing class hit counts
  - Runs since last new class discovery

- Add UnexploredSeed struct for explainability:
  - Tracks seed values with optional topological scores
  - Enables debugging of exploration prioritization

- Add novelty_histogram field to CoverageMetrics:
  - Maps novelty score to run count
  - Provides summary of exploration effectiveness

Constants for tuning:
- DEFAULT_SATURATION_WINDOW = 10 runs
- DEFAULT_UNEXPLORED_LIMIT = 5 seeds

These metrics enable better understanding of when exploration has
reached diminishing returns and which seeds remain worth exploring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
